name: Zendikar Rising

draft.notes: Every pack contains exactly one non-foil double-faced card in a normal slot per its rarity (20 DFC uncommons, 11 DFC rares, 5 DFC mythics, the DFC rares/mythics being in addition to normal counts). If a foil appears it displaces a common and appears after the rare. Ad card may be a double-faced card placeholder. Three variations of each basic land.

sourceNotes: Large set of the era. Printed US, Belgium, Japan. 36 packs per box. Set boosters also existed but are not modelled per spec. Rare count 64 includes 11 DFC; mythic 20 includes 5 DFC.
